When hit, gain +1 [Laceration] Count.
Gain 1 [HardenedBlood] every time this unit loses 20% HP.
If there is a Bloodfiend on the field, regardless of whether it is an ally or an enemy, increase [BloodDinner] by 30

- Prioritizes targets with [Laceration]

passives.name: Thirst for Blood

passives.desc:
If this unit is on field, or is one of the units that can appear on this Stage, increase [BloodDinner] value by the amount of [Laceration] damage collectively received by every unit. 
When this unit enters the field, the sleeping blood drenching the battlefield will surface.
passives.name: Bloodfeast

passives.desc: At 2+ [BloodScissor], enhance the blades of the scissor.
passives.name: Blood-tinged Scissorblades

passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 0.
passives.name: Panic Recovery

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Consume up to 50 [BloodDinner]; gain 1 [BloodScissor] for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed
[WhenUse] If this unit failed to consume [BloodDinner] with this Skill, gain 5 [Laceration] and 1 [HardenedBlood].
[WhenUse] If target has 5+ [Laceration], Coin Power +1
skills.name: We've an Event for You!

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Consume up to 5 [BloodScissor] and deal +(20 * consumed [BloodScissor])% damage (max 100%)
